description: Core Q&A — basic knowledge base retrieval tests

test_cases.description: Agent responds to greeting with capabilities

messages.content: Hello, what can you help me with?

test_cases.description: Agent uses knowledge base for factual question

messages.content: What are the key findings from the latest research report?

llm_judge.criteria: Uses KB results and cites sources

test_cases.description: Agent admits when it doesn't know

messages.content: What is the exact revenue of XYZ Corp in Q3 2025?

llm_judge.criteria: Admits uncertainty rather than fabricating numbers
